titleStmt.title: SII 26.428: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 428. (A.R. No. 407 of 1909.) SIDDHALIṄGAMAḌAM, TIRUKKOYILUR TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of 16 kāśu to the temple of the god Tiruppulipagavadēvar of Śiṟṟiṅgūr, a brahmadēyam in Kuṟukkai-kuṟṟam in Malāḍu in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu, by the Brāhmaṇī Āṭkoṇḍāṉ-śāṇi, wife of the Śivabrāhmaṇa Kāśyapan Periyāṇḍā[ṉ] of the same place, in connection with the setting up by her of an image of the deity Kshētrapālap-piḷḷaiyār and consecrating it in the said temple. Besides, a sum of 18 kāśu was also deposited in the temple by her to provide for food-offerings to the same image during a sandhi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉacakravattikaḷ śrī rājarājadevaṟkku yāṇṭu 8 vatu rājarājavaḷanāṭṭu malāṭṭuk kuṟukkaikūṟṟattu
ḷ brahmadeyañ ciṟṟiṅkūr Uṭaiyār tiruppulipakavadevar koyilil civabrāhmaṇan kāśyapana periyāṇṭāṉ brāhmaṇi Āṭko
ṇṭāṉc cāṇiyeṉ Ivvūr Uṭaiyar tiruppulipakavardevar koyilil kṣettra- pālappiḷḷaiyārai Eḻuntaruḷuviccu tirupratiṣṭhai
yum paṇṇuvittu tirumāḷikaiyil Eḻuntaruḷi Irun=ta patti ceykaikku śrī paṇṭārattu Oṭukkiṉa kācu patināṟu piḷḷaiyāṟku Oru san=tiyamutu ceytaru
ḷukaikku veṇṭuvaṉa Ittevar śrī paṇṭārattile vaṭṭu celuttukaikku śrī paṇṭārattu nāṉ Oṭukkiṉa kācu patineṭṭu Ikkācu patineṭṭum Oṭukki
Itu cantrādittavaṟ celvatāka ceytu viṭṭen Āṭkoṇṭāṉ cāṉiyeṉ Itu panmāheśvararakṣai ...§
Digital edition of SII 26.428 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
